Hero.title: Edgar Macías
Hero.role: Senior Backend Engineer | Distributed Systems & AI-First Architecture
Hero.specialty: Specialist in Cloud-Native Architecture, Scalability and Security-by-Design
Hero.description: 8+ years of experience designing and optimizing high-impact distributed systems. Focused on building scalable data processing engines, event-driven architectures, and AI-First solutions, ensuring performance and robustness.

Experience.title: Impactful Experience
Experience.description: Technical leadership in the development of critical platforms for university management, impacting thousands of users.

achievements.users: Development of scalable systems managing data for over 300,000 students.
achievements.migration: Successful migration of legacy databases with millions of records, ensuring integrity and zero downtime.
achievements.security: Implementation of Security-by-Design architectures and SAST/DAST automation in CI/CD pipelines, ensuring reliability at scale.
achievements.optimization: Optimization of administrative processes, reducing response times by 60%.

Journey.title: The Journey: From Academia to Cloud-Native Architecture

milestones.title: Software Engineering & Legacy Architecture
description: Designed and implemented a rules engine for critical certification processes.
Ensured 100% accuracy in official document issuance.
Optimized workflows using Symfony and AngularJS.

milestones.title: Modernization & Scaling of Critical Systems
description: Dockerized legacy systems to prioritize operational continuity.
Refactored obsolete code, significantly reducing technical debt.
Managed high-concurrency traffic during enrollment periods.

milestones.title: Full-Stack Mobile Development (Freelance)
description: Developed a complete mobile app for a taxi service.
Integrated cloud backend with Google Maps API and geolocation.
Led the full cycle from architectural design to deployment.
milestones.tech_stack: Flutter (Dart), Cloud Firebase, NoSQL, Google Maps API

milestones.title: Data Migrations & Custom Tools
description: Migrated critical database from SQL Server to PostgreSQL with zero data loss.
Developed custom ETL in PHP ensuring record integrity.
Automated validation and cleaning of millions of academic records.
milestones.tech_stack: PostgreSQL, Python, ETL Custom, SQL Server

milestones.title: Technical Leadership & Distributed Systems
description: Led agile teams in developing microservices-oriented platforms.
Designed scalable architectures ensuring high availability and data consistency.
Integrated Security-by-Design principles and advanced observability across the stack.

milestones.title: AI-First Architecture & Data Processing
description: Design and development of real-time data processing engines.
Implementation of Automated Data Analysis Engines with Go for high concurrency.
Research and integration of Applied AI (RAG/LLMs) in Cloud environments.

devcybsec.title: DevCybSec - Automated System Design
devcybsec.description: Organization focused on robust data processing, automated analysis, and secure system design for cloud-native infrastructures.

fullstack-lab-showcase.title: Micro-frontend & Go Backend Architecture
fullstack-lab-showcase.description: Distributed architecture showcasing high-concurrency handling, data consistency with PostgreSQL, and micro-frontends.

minisast.title: Automated Data Analysis Engine
minisast.description: Source code analysis engine built with Go, optimized for high performance, low latency, and complex data structure parsing.

hexagonalauth.title: Go Hexagonal Auth
hexagonalauth.description: Development of a hexagonal architecture for authentication and authorization.
